summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: 2D quantum-state plane spanned by |α⟩ (x-axis, BLUE) and |β⟩ (y-axis, RED). Unit circle + target-amplitude band (GREEN). For N=100, M=1, θ=arcsin(1/10). ValueTracker k_tr advances Grover iterations k=0 → k*≈7.85; always_redraw YELLOW state arrow + dot at angle (2k+1)θ + angle arc. Live panel tracks N, M, θ, angle, amplitude² on target, k*.
